desc: POV: you pull up to a restaurant in Bangkok and end up meeting the OWNER… and his energy is just as good as the food 🥹✨ I had the chance to meet Brandon, the owner of Culture Bangkok (with a Q 👀), and he really poured his heart into this place. You can FEEL it in the food, the staff, and the whole vibe What I ordered: 🍤 Shrimp deviled eggs 🦀 Crab cakes 🐟 Fried catfish with dirty rice + broccoli (with that creole Cajun butter sauce 😮‍🔥) My friend got: 🍗 Fried chicken & red velvet waffles And yes… they got Slap Ya Mama + Red Hot in there 😭🔥 So you already KNOW it’s legit This isn’t just food… this is CULTURE, community, and real flavor brought all the way to Thailand ❤️ If you’re in Bangkok, you NEED to experience this And if you’re in Pattaya, they have TWO locations there too 👀 📍Bangkok (Thonglor / Phrom Phong area) 📍Pattaya (2 locations) Shoutout to Brandon & his wife for the love, the hospitality, and the experience ✨ #Bangkok #thailand #fyp #travel #qulture@Qulture Thailand

Thailand travel tips you NEED to know before you go 🇹🇭👀✈️ Before you book anything, these essential travel tips could save your wallet, your time, and your shoulders. 👏🏽 Whether you’re heading to Bangkok, Chiang Mai, or the Phi Phi Islands, here’s what every traveler needs to know. 🇹🇭 1. Street Food is a Must-Try Thailand’s street food is world-famous for a reason. Even those tiny side stalls are usually safe to eat from. My rule of thumb: if it’s busy, smells good, and looks clean, go for it. You’ll find some of your best meals right there on the street. 🚗 2. Transportation: Bolt is Cheaper, Grab is handy! Bolt and Grab are your go-to ride apps in Thailand. Bolt is often more affordable, but Grab is still great for food delivery and as a backup. In Bangkok, traffic is brutal, so use a motorbike taxi if you’re in a hurry. Just hold on tight! 🙏 3. Temples Are Sacred, So Dress the Part Temples are absolutely stunning, but modest dress is a must. Cover your shoulders and knees, and take off your shoes before entering. Wear slip-ons and bring a lightweight scarf to throw on when needed. Respect goes a long way. 💳 4. Carry Cash While some places take cards, they often charge a 3%. Cash is king, especially in smaller towns or markets. ATMs are accessible in the tourist areas! Travel with a card that doesn’t charge foreign transaction fees if you can. 🌞 5. Sunscreen is Not Optional This one’s for everyone (even if you've got melanin, yes!). The sun in Thailand is intense. I don’t burn easily, and even I ended up peeling. Pack that SPF and don’t forget the bug spray. Trust me, your skin will thank you. Thailand is unforgettable, and knowing these tips ahead of time will make your trip that much smoother. ✈️ Want more real-world travel tips, smart packing advice, and no-nonsense guides? Follow for more. Is Thailand on your list?  #SoutheastAsia #traveltok #traveltiktok #thailandtravel #thailandtips #thailandtrip
hashtags: southeastasia, traveltok, traveltiktok, thailandtravel, thailandtips, thailandtrip

What we got up to in Bangkok! 1. Midnight TukTuk food tour A fun way to see the city and try Thai cuisines from different areas of Thailand. Tour ends at Eagle Nest Bar which has the best view of Wat Arun at night  2. Day trip to Ayutthaya We booked tour that included a sunset boat tour, and it was such a beautiful time of the day to see Thailand old capital city in golden light! 3. Renting Thai Traditional Dress at Wat Arun Seeing the beautiful Wat Arun is an activity in itself - but rent the Thai traditional clothing to really elevate your trip to Wat Arun! They cost around 200THB to rent for few hours. 4. Chao Phraya River Dinner Cruise Such a beautiful way to see Bangkok’s riverfront at night! You’ll see landmarks such as Iconsiam, grand palace, wat Arun and Asiatique. There’s so many river cruises with all different entertainment. We booked ours with Manhora Cruises which focused on the food - IT WAS SO GOOOOOD 5. Temple Hopping A lot of Bangkok’s famous temples are along the riverfront, so it’s easy to allocate a half day/ day to check them all out! 6. Rooftop Bars VIEWS ON VIEWS - rooftop bar drinks are defs pricier but the views are worth it. We checked out Red Sky Bar, Cocoa XO bar, eagle nest bar and Paradise Lost. 7. Asiatique The markets here are so cute and overall it’s a super cute vibe. Defs touristy but I still really enjoyed it. We bought about 8 Thai elephant pants from here HAHAHAH 8. Insane shopping malls I HAD NO VIDEOS SORRY - but for sure check out Bangkok’s INSANE shopping malls. Siam Paragon, Centralworld and the new Emsphere 🤍 Next to centralworld you also have the Erawan shrine which is beautiful to check out too. What else was on our itinerary but didn’t go to plan: - Floating Markets day trip  - Erawan falls daytrip  - Pattaya daytrip to see the Sanctuary of Truth  🏷️  Bangkok what to do in Bangkok Thailand #bangkokexplores #thailandreels #whattodoinbangkok #ayutthaya #tuktukfoodtour #watarun #bangkokdaytrip #bangkokitinerary #bangkok #bangkokreels #thailandexplores #thailand #thailandtrip

When the Jackfruit is just too big to fit 😬😅 This is Thong Ploy ขนุนทองพลอย a variety of jackfruit in Thailand that can reach up to 60kg (132lbs!!).  It’s going viral on Tiktok and Facebook because not only is it ENORMOUS but is also DELICIOUS!  Move over Thong Prasert, Thong Ploy has come to Bangkok!  Its texture is both crispy and flexible, so it has a good bite but doesn’t taste starchy. It’s very sweet and has a strong jackfruit bubblegum flavor with brown sugar taste that is really good. This variety has started to become popular for export to the middle east, China and other countries. Hopefully you’ll get a chance to try it when you come to Thailand! #ขนุน #fruit #funny #thailand

desc: #ELLEDigitalCover พบกับสองนักแสดงตัวแทนคนรุ่นใหม่อย่าง เลิฟ ภัทรานิษฐ์ และ โทมัส ธีร์ทัศน์ ที่โคจรมาพบกันบนหน้าปกดิจิทัล ประจำเดือนพฤษภาคม ร่วมออกเดินทางพักผ่อนอย่างมีสไตล์กับกระเป๋าเดินทางดีไซน์ไอคอนิกจาก Tumi ที่ผสานเส้นโค้งเอกลักษณ์ของรุ่น 19 Degree เข้ากับความสะดวกสบายของดีไซน์เปิดฝาด้านหน้า รวมไปถึงกระเป๋ารุ่น Wallet On Chain ดีไซน์เรียบหรูที่สามารถใช้งานได้หลากหลายรูปแบบเข้ากับทุกโอกาส ติดตามชมภาพแฟชั่นเซ็ตการเดินทางครั้งใหม่ของ เลิฟ และ โทมัส ได้ทุกแพลตฟอร์มออนไลน์ของแอลเร็วๆ นี้ #ELLEThailand #TumiTH #loverrukk #tthomastc
